caption: A woman with shoulder-length black hair and glasses is captured in a series of frames against a solid black background. She is wearing a light green, long-sleeved tunic with an embroidered neckline and a dark beaded necklace. A small black lapel microphone is clipped to her garment. Throughout the sequence, she is speaking and using hand gestures to emphasize her points; she starts with her right hand slightly raised, moves it upward and outward, and then shifts her hand positions as she continues talking. In the lower left of each frame, a small circular logo is visible alongside the text "NPTEL". The lighting remains consistent, focused on the woman, and the camera angle remains a steady medium shot throughout the clip.
